name: Butterscotch Wheat Germ Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup broken walnut or pecan meats
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt shortening in the mixing bowl using microwave oven.
3. Add molasses, sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Stir well.
4. Sift powdered milk, baking powder, and salt into the mixture. Add wheat germ and nut meats, stirring only enough to blend (about 20 strokes).
5. Line a pan with waxed paper, mitering corners. Spread dough in the pan.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes at 350°F.
7. Turn out of the pan, remove wax paper immediately, and cut into bars or squares while warm.
